source: AI4I UDI-order simulated time-series future deviation prediction
note: This is a simulated forecasting PoC. AI4I does not provide a real factory timestamp or live sensor stream.

target_definition.future_max_risk_actual_h10: max XGBoost failure probability over the next 10 simulated steps
target_definition.future_deviation_actual_h10: 1 if any next 10 steps cross threshold or SPC risk limit

classification.selection_rule: highest validation f1_score, then highest recall if tied
